title: anarthrophyllum rigidum
intro: Anarthrophyllum rigidum, also known as the mountain bean, is a type of flowering plant native to New Zealand. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antiseptic. The health benefits of Anarthrophyllum rigidum include its potential to alleviate symptoms of arthritis, reduce fever, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Anarthrophyllum rigidum can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional Maori medicine to promote overall well-being and healing.
